description_long: This is a modern, multi-functional wooden desk with a light oak finish, featuring a spacious main work surface and an upper shelving unit for additional storage. The left side of the desk includes a set of three metallic-handled drawers, while the right side has a closed cabinet with a white door. Above the main surface, there are two open shelves and a closed cubby, providing ample space for books, office supplies, or decorative items. The desk also features a pull-out keyboard tray beneath the main surface, supported by metal runners. The overall design is practical and contemporary, suitable for both professional and home office environments.
description: A light oak-finished desk with drawers, shelves, a closed cabinet, and a pull-out keyboard tray, designed for organized workspace use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main work surface, upper shelving, closed cabinet with a white door, and the set of drawers on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the side profile of the drawers, and the layered shelving above.
description_view_2: Top-down angled view displaying the full layout of the desk, including the drawers, cabinet, open shelves, and the pull-out keyboard tray.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the closed cabinet, the shelving structure, and the curved edge of the main work surface.
attribute_location: home office or small business workspace
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features the drawers on the left, the main work surface in the center, and the closed cabinet with a white door on the right, with shelving above for storage.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or study desk for organized office or home use
